subcodes.title: Words to some children, spoken on 1912-11-24
subcodes.first_line: I hope that you will be educated as you ought to be and that each of you will become the pride of your family. May God assist you to acquire divine knowledge
subcodes.first_line_orig: من امیدوارم چنانچه باید و شاید تربیت شوید و هر یک سبب فخر خاندان خویش گردید خدا شما را تأیید کند
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @praise and encouragement, @parents and children; youth; families, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
